Global Extension Control Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc49156437 \h 1 1.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc49156438 \h 1 1.2 Add C-000-EX23 Code Id to C-000 Global Code PAGEREF _Toc49156439 \h 3 1.3 C-000 EX23 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc49156440 \h 4 2. EX23 Control Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc49156441 \h 5 2.1 C-EX23 Parameters PAGEREF _Toc49156442 \h 5 2.2 C-EX23 – Code IDs PAGEREF _Toc49156443 \h 6 3. Additional Facility Configuration PAGEREF _Toc49156444 \h 7 4. Batch Configuration PAGEREF _Toc49156445 \h 7 5. Job Function Level Configuration PAGEREF _Toc49156446 \h 7 6. Job Function Configuration PAGEREF _Toc49156447 \h 8 7. Job Function Performance Goal Configuration PAGEREF _Toc49156448 \h 9 8. Purge Configuration PAGEREF _Toc49156449 \h 10 1 . Global Extension Control Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 ( Global Extens ion Control ) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. 2343785 9036050 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 0 0 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 Click ADD. Populate the following information below . Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information below . Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 0 0 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 Click on the Parameters tab check the box to enable all custom functionality and SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 0 0 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 Add C-000-EX23 Code Id to C-000 Global Code Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000 - EX0 23 if it has not been added. Search for system code C- 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code and click Code IDs in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot below . Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 6 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 0 0 Page 6 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 C-000 EX23 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab l ocated next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality and click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 7 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 0 0 Page 7 of = NUMPAGES 1 1 2 . EX23 Control Code Setup Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- X 23 if it has not been added. Click the Add button Enter the information in the screenshot below and click SAVE 2.1 C-EX23 Parameters Click the Checkbox to select custom code C- E 23 in the System Codes menu. Click on the Parameters action button. This will bring you to Parameters tab. Click Add button. C omplete the fields with the information provided in the screenshot and select the indicated checkboxes and drop-down menu selections. The values in these bytes are determined by MCLN operational needs. Click Save 2.2 C-EX 23 – Code ID s After C-EX 23 has been added, click the checkbox to select the C-EX 23 Code. Click on the Code ID's action button. This will bring you to the details tab. On the details tab, click the ADD button. Enter the information below in the Details tab. Select Parameters tab – these values are determined by operational needs Click SAVE to save the Code ID. 3 . Additional Facility Configuration In Additional Facility Configuration UI , in the Calculations tab, configure the Employee Performance Goal Source parameter as ‘Hours Worked’. 4 . Batch Configuration In Batch Process Inquiry UI , configure the following batches according to Manhattan R&D recommendations and ensure they are in ‘Waiting to Run’ status: ASYNCWMOSEventProcessingBatch PerfEvaluationProcessBatch ReprocessCICOProcessor 5 . Job Function Level Configuration -433070 636905 0 0 In System Codes UI , configure Level 1 groups in System Code L-021 per the Design Matrix and section 5.4.2 of the Extension Spec document. right 119215 6 . Job Function Configuration center 571158 0 0 In Job Functions UI , configure all Job Functions where Training Curves will be utilized and assign a Level 1 value. In the Level Training Requirements UI , configure all the training parameters based on the Level 1 Code the Job Function is assigned to. -612140 0 0 0 7 . Job Function Performance Goal Configuration -520700 628650 0 0 In Job Functions UI > More > Performance Goal, configure the Training Curves for the Level 1 grouping corresponding to the Job Function. Purge Config uration In Purge System Tables UI , configure the Employee Clock In Clock Out purge code to test functionality related System Code ID ‘Limit Training Hours’ = Yes. Click Add Enter the information below , setting Purge Older Than Days equal to desired purge days. Note: this can be set to a smaller value for testing and updated before setting up systemic purging. Cl ick Save
